sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72067" key="o)donto/keras" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀδοντό-κερας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n72067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">horn-tooth,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tusk,</tr_> of an elephant, Amynt. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.357</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
